title: neolacis divaricata
intro: Neolacis divaricata, also known as the divaricate neolacis or mountain tea tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neolacis divaricata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Neolacis divaricata can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in various medicinal preparations, including tinctures and infusions.
